abilities.description: Untap each enchanted permanent you control.

effect.description: Untap each enchanted permanent you control.
effect.name: UntapAll

abilities.description: Create a white Aura enchantment token named Mask attached to another target permanent. The token has enchant permanent and umbra armor.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target permanent to attach Mask Token

abilities.description: Mill seven cards. Return all non-Aura enchantment cards from your graveyard to the battlefield, then do the same for Aura cards.
